© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Opportunity cost
What are you giving up by the choices you make?
• Dean Graziosi - What do you have to give up, in
order to make time/space for something new?
• As you become successful, deal flow increases
• Being aware of opportunity costs becomes
increasingly more important - develop the ability
to say no
The value of a focus day
• Dan Sullivan 101
• Free days - nothing business related
• Buffer days - nitty gritty business tasks
• Focus days - when you’re doing nothing but
your genius work
The value of a focus day
• What’s the value of an entire day spent on
focused work?
• Calculate it:
• Total days in a year - minus free days
(weekends/vacations)
• Minus realistic # of buffer days = days left for
focus days
• Take your income and divide it by the # of focus
days - and you can calculate the value of a focus
day
